text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well! Mile Championship, we meet at
last!
choice_data_list: Is your head in the game?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You bet it is! All that's left is to run my heart out!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me. I oughta say howdy to
Suzuka before the race starts.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: ...On second thought, maybe I better not!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka's my pal... but today, she's the rival I
wanna beat more than anybody.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We'll leave the jawin' for after the race!
choice_data_list: Make it a race to remember!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Just ya wait! You and Suzuka are gonna be blown
away by my super-charged running!
